name: RAG + Memory
description: Retrieval feeds a long-term memory layer that enriches the prompt before generation — RAG context plus conversation history.

data.label: How it works
data.text: The Retriever fetches document chunks; the Memory node merges them with long-term conversation history so the LLM sees both fresh context and what it already knows about the user.

data.label: Generator
data.systemPrompt: Answer using the retrieved context AND the conversation memory. Prefer remembered user preferences when both apply.

data.label: Checkpointer
data.text: The Memory node exports as a LangGraph checkpointer, so every turn of the conversation persists across invocations of the graph.
